resolution.summary: 新增 `atm tasks realign-plan-source`（pure-move digest 閘 + closure 欄位保護 + 單一 batch commit）。

finding: There is no governed lane for bulk planning-source path realignment. After the owner-ordered planning-repo reorganization (79 task cards moved to their canonical family directories), every ledger file's source.planPath went stale, but: (a) git record-commit refuses multi-task record batches (ATM_CROSS_TASK_MUTATION_BLOCKED) and silently drops single task-owned files (see ATM-BUG-2026-07-17-002); (b) tasks claim on done tasks returns ATM_TASK_CLAIM_NOT_READY so git commit --task is unreachable; (c) tasks reconcile requires --delivery-commit; (d) tasks import --write refuses on hash conflict and --force is gated behind the emergency lease lane. Net effect: 79 stale planPath entries cannot be corrected through any normal governed path.
expectedBehavior: A first-class maintenance verb (e.g. `atm tasks realign-plan-source --map <from,to json>` or import --refresh-paths) that re-resolves planPath/planningSourceSeal.taskCardPath against the planning repo for closed tasks, verifies contentDigest is unchanged (proving a pure move), and commits the batch as one governed maintenance commit without requiring per-task claims or an emergency lease.
evidenceOrRepro: 2026-07-17 session after 3KLife commits 1cfaf8e2/15eebaf6/e8f6908b: all four governed routes above were attempted and blocked; the only remaining route was `emergency approve` + `tasks import --write --force` per card.
proposedDirection: Build the realign verb on top of the existing planningSourceSeal contentDigest check (content-only digest is move-invariant), classify the resulting ledger diff as low-risk metadata, and allow a single batch commit when every changed field is planPath/taskCardPath only.
followUp: Build the realign verb on top of the existing planningSourceSeal contentDigest check (content-only digest is move-invariant), classify the resulting ledger diff as low-risk metadata, and allow a single batch commit when every changed field is planPath/taskCardPath only.
